titleStmt.title: SII 37.47: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 47. (A.R. No. B 431 of 1938-39.) Vallūru, Cuddapah Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab set up in front of the Śiva temple.
This is dated Śaka 1475, Pramādi, Āshāḍha śu. 10, corresponding to 1553 A.D., June 21, Wednesday.

It records the grant of dommari-pannu, due from the village Vallūru alias Timmasamudram, by dommari, Kāki Padmarāju and others (names given) to the gods Hari and Hara of Pedavallūru alias Timmasamudram situated to the south of the Pennā and included in the Pushpagiri region of Gaṇḍikōṭa-sīma in Udayagiri-rājya. The gift is stated to have been made for the merit of the 24 communities of the dommaris.
[Published in Inscriptions of Andhra Pradesh; Cuddapah District, Part II, No. 228.]

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Avighnamastu .
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivā
hana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1475 Agunē
ṭi pramādhi saṁvuccara Āṣāḍha śu 10 lu .
śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvī
rapratāpa śrī sadāsivadēva mahārāyalu
vijayanagaramaṁddu vajrasiṁhvāsanārūḍhuṁ
ḍai pṛthvi sāṁmrājyaṁ śēyiyucuṁḍḍaṁgānu
vudayagiri rājyānunaku cellē gaṁḍikōṭa
sīmalōnu puṣpagiri prāṁtyaṁ peṁnaku da
kṣaṇaṁ pedavallūriki pratināmamaina
tiṁmasamudraṁ Agrahārānu ha
riharādulu doṁmmari kāki paṁ
dmarāju doṁmmari mīsaragaṁḍani
ponāreḍḍi dommari mīsaragaṁ
ḍḍani tipparājunu dommari turukā
ṇyaṁ basvarājuṁnnu voḍapōtināyiḍu
Iccina dhaṁ¨rmmaśāsanaṁ mākiccē dhoṁmma
ripannu doṁmmari kāki paṁdmarājunu mī
saragaṁḍani poṁnāreḍḍini mīsaragaṁḍani
basvarājuṁnnu doṁmari voḍapōti nā
yaṁḍunnutama doṁmmari yiravainālu
gu kulālavārikiṁnni puṇyaṁgānu A
kṣatadhiya puṁṇyakālamaṁdu vollū
rki pratināmamaina tiṁmmasamudrānu
tama doṁmmarivāriki Iccē paṁnnutama
doṁmmarivāru yiravainālugu kulā
lavārikiṁnni puṁṇyaṁgānu Ācaṁdrā
rkhastāIgānu hariharādulu dhāravō
siyistiṁ yīdhaṁ¨rmānaku tama doṁma
rivāru yavvaru tappinānu gaṁgaka
gōvuṁ brāṁhmala vadhiṁccina pā
vuvāru Iṭani yīdhaṁ¨rmmaśāsa
kaṁgānu yāṁbhaiyāru
naḍipē
Digital edition of SII 37.47 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
